title: helichrysum milfordiae
intro: Helichrysum milfordiae, also known as the silver ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Helichrysum milfordiae is used to support health by reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antifungal benefits. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
